data.title: [Cleanup] Display-roman utility: replace ~12 copy-pasted inline style={{fontWeight:300,textTransform:'uppercase',fontStyle:'normal'}} with a single class

data.to:
**[CRITICAL CLEANUP]**

Per FRAC-21 §S1: the verbatim inline triplet `style={{ fontWeight: 300, textTransform: "uppercase", fontStyle: "normal" }}` is copy-pasted ~12 times across pages/sections.

## Where it's used (incomplete sample from audit)
- `src/pages/Home.tsx:30`
- `src/pages/EventsPage.tsx:19,50,63`
- `src/pages/LabPage.tsx:27`
- `src/pages/NeighborhoodPage.tsx:22`
- `src/pages/PoliticalClubPage.tsx:19`
- `src/pages/PeoplePage.tsx:22`
- `src/pages/StoryPage.tsx:211`
- `src/components/sections/Campus.tsx:184`
- `src/components/sections/LiberalArts.tsx:13`

## Action

1. Add a utility in `src/index.css` `@layer utilities`:
```css
.display-roman {
  font-weight: 300;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  font-style: normal;
}
```
2. Replace every inline triplet with `className="display-roman"` (preserving any existing classes).
3. Grep verify: zero remaining occurrences of `fontStyle: "normal"` paired with `textTransform: "uppercase"` in inline styles in `src/`.

## Acceptance criteria

- `.display-roman` defined in `src/index.css`
- ~12 inline triplets replaced
- No visual change

## Cites
FRAC-21 synthesis §S1

data.body: Review (orchestrator, fresh context): 13 hits replaced across 11 sites; 4 non-triplet sites correctly left alone (Navbar's textTransform:'none' cases + 1 Home.tsx fontStyle-only). Utility added to index.css. Build passes, tests match baseline. Branch frac-31-display-roman.
